content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad market green with banking, auto, IT and PSU banks leading. VIX cooling to 17.5 supports risk-on. Nifty above 24,150 with global cues constructive (US markets +0.7-1%). However, individual position management dominates today given multiple held names with binary catalysts (HAL May 14 results, DABUR May 7 results, multiple Q4 prints).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1038.51,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD effectively — current SL 1038.51 is already ~1.5% below CMP 1053.90 (within trail-gap discipline), captures +5.5% of the +7.7% unrealized gain. Q4 print was strong (PAT +19% YoY, disbursements +36%). No change needed; emitting unchanged values would be no-op MODIFY — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1038.51 is 1.45% below CMP 1053.90 — appropriate trail gap, no adjustment needed. Thesis intact: Q4 strong, NBFC sector recovering. Hold to original target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Recovering today +1.05% on weaker dollar/geopolitical bid. SL 119 (-3.7% from CMP) gives breathing room. MACD bearish but BB mid-line near current price suggests consolidation. Hold defensive position."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock at 52-week high 1748 yesterday, gave back to 1737. Current SL 1715 is at entry+0.9% (locks small gain). Stored SL is already above breakeven. Marginal red day after huge rally — maintain SL at 1715, no churn. NOTE: This MODIFY repeats stored values — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1715 sits 1.27% below CMP 1737 — already locking in small gain at breakeven+. Stock at 52w high zone after Q4 beat. No-op on MODIFY; keep SL/target as-is. Trail to 1730 only after CMP clears 1770."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Effectively flat at -0.1%. PSU/Banking sector strong today. Stock near 52w high 212.66. SL 204 (~2.3% below CMP) appropriate. Q4 turnaround thesis intact — give it time to break out above 212."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results scheduled May 14 — that is 6 trading sessions away (outside the 3-session binary cooldown window today, but approaching). Currently +1.4% with SL 4540 (~2.1% below CMP). Will reassess and either tighten SL or exit if results window enters 3-session band by May 11. Stock up 31% in a month — extended technically. Hold for now; plan to trim/tighten on May 11."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.4% intraday on profit-booking after huge run (+57% in a month). Q4 was a beat (PAT tripled YoY). SL 372 just 1% below CMP 368.65 — wait, CMP 368.65 is ALREADY below SL 372. State check: stored_sl 372 > cmp 368.65, so SL has been triggered/will trigger. This needs EXIT now to honor SL discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 130,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.65 has BREACHED stored SL 372. Stop-loss discipline mandates exit. Stock running into profit-booking after +57% month run; consensus 1yr target ~258 well below CMP suggests crowded long. Net loss ~1.5% (-₹1,475). Honor the stop, free up capital."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results just published (May 5): PAT +124.8% YoY, revenue +60.2%, net-debt negative. Strong fundamentals support thesis. Currently -2% with SL 1420 (~2.5% below CMP 1457) — within budget. Stock rallied 9.5% intraday yesterday before settling — consolidation phase. Hold to original target 1570."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat (EPS Rs 130, 5.5% above consensus). +2.2% unrealized. Stock pulled back from 7200 high to 6995 today — within normal volatility. SL 6900 (1.4% below CMP) too tight given ATR; but cannot loosen per rules. Hold; if today closes above 7050 will trail SL up to 6950 next session."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 0,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 0,
      "stop_loss": 0,
      "target": 0,
      "confidence": 0.0,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PLACEHOLDER — ignore. Replaced by NO_ACTION below."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1038.51 already trailing well above breakeven (entry 984), captures +5.5% locked gain at 1.45% below CMP. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Recovering today on geopolitical/USD weakness. SL 119 gives room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1715 already at entry+0.9%, breakeven+ locked. Trail higher only after CMP confirms above 1770."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Banking sector strength supportive. Near 52w high; SL 204 appropriate at -2.3%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "May 14 results = 6 sessions out. Re-assess on May 11 when window enters 3-session binary band."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.65 below stored SL 372 — stop triggered, exit at market."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results just printed strong; consolidation post 9% rally. SL 1420 (-2.5%) within budget."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat, hold to original target. Will revisit SL after today's close."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "DABUR — Q4 results May 7 (tomorrow) = binary event in 1 session, NO new entry per rule 11. COFORGE/M&M/CAMS gap-ups already extended; chasing post-gap is poor risk-reward. LALPATHLAB hit 20% UC yesterday — wait for consolidation, not entry zone. VEDL/AUROPHARMA — momentum names, prefer to see day-2 follow-through. RRKABEL/LALPATHLAB volume divergence interesting but no clean entry. TITAGARH BUY @838 still OPEN from earlier — let it sit; will not stack. POLYCAB — Q4 today, binary, skip. CHENNPETRO read-through reminds me NOT to chase post-result names without verifying overhangs.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 43%, cash 57%. Book is well-diversified across Financials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK), Capital Goods/Defence (HAL, BHEL→exiting), Realty (SOBHA), Logistics (ADANIPORTS), Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), and Gold (GOLDBEES). No cluster overweight. After BHEL exit, ~₹49K freed. With multiple binary events approaching (DABUR May 7, HAL May 14) and TITAGARH order pending, holding capital in reserve is prudent. NOT adding new positions today — quality of held book is good, several names need to mature. Daily P&L +0.57% — disciplined day."
}
